chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S-219 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge 01.For orders on M.A.No.3461/2020 02.For orders on office objection “A” 03.For orders on M.A.No.3462/2020 04.For hearing of main case. 27-08-2020 Makhdoom Syed Tahir Abbas Shah, Advocate for the applicant -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exception. 4. The applicant by way of instant application u/s. 561-A Cr.PC has mainly sought for issuance of direction against learned trial Magistrate, to pass appropriate order on his application dated 14.04.2020, for amending the charge. If learned trial Magistrate is found to be reluctant to pass any order on application of the applicant then such omission could have been brought by the applicant within the notice of learned Sessions Judge having jurisdiction, instead of exhausting the inherit jurisdiction of this Court. Consequently, the instant application u/s.561-A Cr.PC being misconceived is dismissed in limine. J U D G E
